slides.title: Tireless Worker ⚙️
slides.content:
Computers excel at doing the same thing thousands of times without complaining.

The `for` loop lets you repeat code a specific number of times.

slides.title: Basic `for` loop

quizData.question: In `for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++)`, how many times will the loop run?
quizData.explanation: It runs for i = 0, 1, 2, 3, and 4. That is 5 times!

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: The `i++` part means 'add 1 to i after each loop'.
